summary: RFX-SUPER-01 delivers RFX-05 through RFX-16 as repo-native, non-owning phase-label support modules with deterministic reason codes, fail-closed guards, and red-team + fix + revalidation triplets for RT-13 through RT-24.
rfx_phase_label_invariant: RFX remains a non-owning phase label. Canonical authority for AEX/TLC/PQX/EVL/TPA/CDE/SEL/GOV/REP/LIN/OBS/SLO/PRA/POL/JDX/JSX/FRE/RIL is unchanged and recorded in docs/architecture/system_registry.md.

implemented_slices.purpose: Fix integrity proof verifying schema, test, eval, replay, lineage, OBS/SLO, certification path, and authority boundaries.
Failure → eval auto-generation with deterministic case ids and non-owning EVL handoff.
Trend detection + hotspot mapping over failures/repairs/replay drift/eval gaps/OBS gaps/freezes/authority findings.
Chaos campaign engine asserting fail-closed behavior across the canonical scenario set.
Cross-run consistency detector for equivalent inputs.
Judgment candidate extraction with non-owning JDX handoff.
Policy candidate compilation with non-owning POL handoff.
Error-budget governance gating new capability vs. reliability work.
System-intelligence layer composing existing RFX artifacts into an advisory report.

red_team_campaigns_run.scenario: Roadmap recommendation without owner / dep / red-team triad
Hide cross-run inconsistency via non-material metadata
Judgment candidate from a single isolated failure
Misclassify feature work as reliability without evidence
Index unsupported memory without source refs

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Aggregate-and-emit reason codes per weakening vector and require full snapshot for each protected guarantee.
Require trace_id and at least one lineage ref before constructing eval case.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Failure record with trace + lineage produces deterministic case id.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Normalize reason codes to a stable cluster key before counting.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Variant rename still surfaces recurrence hotspot.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Require source refs, owners, dependencies, red-team / fix / revalidation triad, and explicit `no_external_dependencies` sentinel for empty deps.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Recommendation passes only when the triad is complete.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Detect failed-open cases (no exception or no expected reason code in message) and emit campaign-level reason codes.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Replacement of the no-op with a blocking case lets the campaign emit a complete record.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Compute fingerprint over a closed material-key set so non-material metadata cannot mask divergence.
Require min distinct failures and min total source refs.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Multi-failure corpus with fix and eval refs produces candidate.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Restrict activation_state to candidate-class values; POL retains activation authority.
Emit `rfx_confidence_without_evidence` when evidence refs are absent.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Adding evidence refs lets the calibration record build.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Require reliability_evidence_refs when work_type claims reliability/hardening.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Refs allow reliability work under exhausted budget.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Require lineage refs and supported artifact types for index entries.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Adding lineage refs allows index build.

fixes_from_red_team_findings.fix: Scan narrative chunks for authority-claiming patterns and validate next-build slice exists in roadmap recommendations.
fixes_from_red_team_findings.revalidation: Neutral narrative produces an advisory report.

known_risks: RFX-07 trend clustering is conservative — heavily disjoint reason codes may not coalesce. The variant-suffix normalizer handles common splits but a malicious actor with arbitrary renaming would still surface ambiguity rather than silent suppression.
RFX-13 calibration uses simple thresholds; production tuning of high/low confidence and drift_delta is governed-policy work that remains POL/EVL territory.
RFX-15 memory index is in-memory only; persistent storage is intentionally outside this PR's scope and remains the responsibility of the canonical owners of each artifact type.
RFX-16 narrative-pattern scan is a coarse, deny-list-style guard; it intentionally over-blocks rather than risk under-blocking authority-claiming language.
